creator: yuri@tsoft.com
text:
As the last step, installer should suggest the user to install bsdstats package and explain why.

This way bsdstats.org will show statistics closer to reality. Today bsdstats only shows ~650 systems in US and 1000+ in Australia even though actual ratio is probably in favor of US. Users just aren't aware of bsdstats package and therefore don't have ot installed.
